diagrams.title: Cache Memory Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between CPU, cache (L1/L2), and main memory with data flow arrows
elements: Arrows showing data transfer on hit/miss
diagrams.purpose: Understanding memory hierarchy and data flow between components

diagrams.title: Direct Mapped Cache Address Format
diagrams.description: Breaks down a 32-bit memory address into tag, index, and offset fields
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how addresses map to cache locations and how to calculate field sizes

diagrams.title: Cache Read Operation Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step decision process for cache read hit and miss
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the cache controller logic for read operations

diagrams.title: Write-Back Cache State Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows states of cache line and transitions during write operations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding cache line lifecycle and dirty bit management
